# CycleWarden

> Open AI-native product kit — idea to governed, evidence-backed shipped web product.

## Start here

- [VISION](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/VISION.md): why CycleWarden exists
- [AGENTS](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/AGENTS.md): rules for coding agents
- [IDEA](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/IDEA.md): current product brief (edit per project)
- [Vibe guide](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/VIBE.md): human+agent workflow
- [Architecture](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md): packages and ports
- [Standards](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/STANDARDS.md): 12-factor, ASVS, agents.md
- [Decisions](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/DECISIONS.md): locked product choices + evolution engine decisions
- [Production checklist](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/PRODUCTION_CHECKLIST.md)
- [Deployment guide](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/DEPLOY.md): production Vercel + Docker deployment
- [Security guide](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/SECURITY.md): CSRF, headers, secrets, upload
- [API key rotation](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/API_KEY_ROTATION.md): rotate secrets safely
- [Multi-framework guide](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/MULTI_FRAMEWORK.md): integrate Nuxt, SvelteKit, etc.

## Evolution engine

- [Roadmap](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/ROADMAP.md): integrated product roadmap
- [Evolution Architecture](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/evolution/ARCHITECTURE.md): state machine, policy, evidence
- [Research Capability](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/evolution/RESEARCH_CAPABILITY.md): public search, claim extraction, contradiction detection
- [Product Thesis](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/evolution/PRODUCT_THESIS.md): why deterministic agent governance
- [Data Governance](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/evolution/DATA_GOVERNANCE.md): event journal, evidence, approvals
- [Execution Backends](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/evolution/EXECUTION_BACKENDS.md): trusted-local, Docker sandbox, future microVM

## Presets & research

- [supabase-full](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/presets/supabase-full.md)
- [portable-pg](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/presets/portable-pg.md) (Better Auth)
- [Research notes](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/RESEARCH_NOTES.md)
- [Development plan / audit](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/DEVELOPMENT_PLAN.md)
- [Competitive benchmark](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/COMPETITIVE_BENCHMARK.md)
- [Quickstart (usable)](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/cyclewarden/blob/main/docs/QUICKSTART.md)
- Skills: .agents/skills/ship-feature, add-entity, security-pass, vibe-setup

## Code map

- apps/web — Next.js UI adapter (landing, auth, dashboard, evolution UI, notes, billing)
- packages/evolution-core — Deterministic lifecycle engine (state machine, policy, evidence, research, CLI)
- packages/config — env + presets
- packages/security — headers, rate limit, validation
- packages/db — schema + SQL (Drizzle ORM)
- packages/auth — AuthPort (framework-agnostic)
- packages/mail — MailPort + createConsoleMailer + createResendMailer
- packages/storage — StoragePort + createLocalStorage + createS3Storage
- packages/logger — LoggerPort + getLogger (structured logging, Pino/Sentry-ready)
- packages/i18n — createDictionary + detectLocale (vi/en locale files included)
- packages/payment — PaymentPort + createNoopPaymentPort (Stripe-ready skeleton)

## Adapters (in apps/web/src/lib/adapters)

- supabase/ — Supabase auth + SSR client
- better-auth/ — Better Auth (self-hosted, Drizzle/Postgres)

## CLI commands

- `pnpm evolve` — Evolution state machine (init, start, inspect, assess, research, handoff, advance)
- `pnpm dev` — Launch web + engine dev mode
- `pnpm verify` — Full quality gate (typecheck + lint + test + build + check:ai)
- `pnpm doctor` — Environment health check
- `pnpm create` — Scaffold new project from template
